title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Godrej Interio

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Godrej Interio
jsonLd.description:
We at Godrej Interio are looking for an experienced Visual Merchandiser based out of Ludhiana. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Godrej Interio:
Godrej Interio is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in POS Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Godrej Interio!
